title: ServiceRegistry Smart Contract: Sentinel Service Registration and Routing Metadata
description: Implement the ServiceRegistry Solidity contract. This contract stores service endpoint metadata — base URL, DID, supported roles (producer/consumer), active status — for all sentinel services participating in the platform. The Discovery Service uses this as a source of truth for routing, and Sentinel nodes can query it to discover peers.
objectives: On-chain registry of sentinel service endpoints and their DIDs
Distinction between producer and consumer roles per service
Event-driven updates consumed by Discovery Service indexer

steps: Step 1 - ServiceRecord Struct: struct ServiceRecord { string serviceId; string did; string baseUrl; string role; bool active; uint256 registeredAt; uint256 updatedAt; string description; }. role is either 'producer' or 'consumer' — validate on entry.

Step 2 - Storage: mapping(bytes32 => ServiceRecord) private _services; key = keccak256(serviceId). mapping(bytes32 => bytes32[]) private _roleIndex; role hash → service key array for role-based enumeration. bytes32[] private _serviceKeys.

Step 3 - Events: event ServiceRegistered(bytes32 indexed serviceIdHash, string serviceId, string did, string role, string baseUrl); event ServiceUpdated(bytes32 indexed serviceIdHash, string serviceId, string newBaseUrl); event ServiceDeregistered(bytes32 indexed serviceIdHash, string serviceId);

Step 4 - registerService(string calldata serviceId, string calldata did, string calldata baseUrl, string calldata role, string calldata description): onlyRole(SERVICE_REGISTRY_ADMIN_ROLE). Validate role is 'producer' or 'consumer'. Validate baseUrl is non-empty. Require service not already active. Compute serviceIdHash. Store. Emit ServiceRegistered.

Step 5 - updateService(string calldata serviceId, string calldata newBaseUrl, string calldata description): onlyRole(SERVICE_REGISTRY_ADMIN_ROLE). Require service exists and is active. Update baseUrl and description. Emit ServiceUpdated.
Step 6 - deregisterService(string calldata serviceId): onlyRole(SERVICE_REGISTRY_ADMIN_ROLE). Set active=false. Remove from _roleIndex. Emit ServiceDeregistered.

Step 7 - Read Functions: getService(string calldata serviceId) returns (ServiceRecord memory). isServiceActive(string calldata serviceId) returns (bool). getServicesByRole(string calldata role) returns (ServiceRecord[] memory) — returns all active services for a given role. getServiceCount() returns (uint256).

Step 9 - URL Validation Helper: Internal function _validateUrl(string calldata url) — checks url length <= 2048. Check url starts with 'https://' (enforced in production, 'http://' allowed only on local/test chain ID 31337).
Step 10 - Constructor: constructor(address initialAdmin). Grant SERVICE_REGISTRY_ADMIN_ROLE to initialAdmin.
security_constraints: baseUrl validation: on non-local chains, MUST start with 'https://' — enforced in Solidity
getServicesByRole iterates an array — cap at 1000 services to prevent out-of-gas
role MUST be one of 'producer' or 'consumer' — validated on-chain with custom error
No DID validation on-chain (too complex) — validated off-chain by Discovery Service before submitting tx

acceptance_criteria: registerService stores record and emits ServiceRegistered
deregisterService sets active=false and removes from role index
URL with http:// on non-local chain reverts with InvalidUrl
